visual-anti-patterns.notes: One anti-pattern: card description text and builder sidebar labels appear below 16px. No purple-to-blue gradient backgrounds, no gradient orbs, no nested cards, no cluttered dashboards.

visual-child-friendly.notes: Large emoji-labeled object buttons, playful theme names, simple vocabulary, and low text density; some secondary controls (theme chips, nav buttons) are smaller than ideal 44px tap targets.

visual-consistency.notes: Consistent purple accent, pill-shaped buttons, rounded card radii, and sans-serif type ramp across all pages; minor drift between plain-white landing cards and gradient-preview gallery cards.

visual-accessibility.notes: Good text-on-white contrast throughout and text labels on most buttons; however the sparkle FAB is icon-only with no label, no keyboard focus rings are visible, and responsive narrow-width behavior is not demonstrated.
